calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Mark Edson, Esq., appearing for Defendant and Cross-Complainant Cathryn J. Brash. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed in its entirety. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Trina Ayala, CSR#12964. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-19-2007 Continued To Jun-18-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Defendants Rogge. The OSC is re-set to 6/18/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Responses To Defts' Discovery Requests; Request For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Motion Of Defendants Bernd L. Rogge and Sigrid Rogge To Compel Plaintiff's Responses To Defendants' Discovery Responses is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff in the amount of $491.84, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Continued To Mar-19-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 3/19/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Christina Paxton, CSR#1558. (212)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Compel Deposition With Production Of Documents, And Responses To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearance:
Mark P. Edson, Esq., for Cathryn Brash, Defendant/Moving Party.

Tentative Ruling adopted: Defendant Cathryn Brash's Motion To Compel Deposition With Production of Documents and Responses To Interrogatories is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to respond to Defendant's form interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is further ordered to appear for his deposition to be noticed by Defendant. Sanctions are awarded in the amount of $270, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Dec-18-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Continued To Nov-03-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Aug-31-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Raymond Burke, 389-8819, appearing for Farley Tolpen, moving to be relieved as counsel

No other appearances on this matter. Farley S. Tolpen's Motion To Be Relieved As Counsel for PLAINTIFF PAULA RATUBALAVU was granted. Order signed in open Court. (301/DEW) JUDGE: DIANE WICK, REPORTER: CANDACE YOUNT, CSR# 2737
